title: Field Audit Receipt v1
description: Receipt emitted by a VerificationRun for one WorkflowContract executed as a SandboxJob. It DELIBERATELY MIRRORS the factory-proven category_cloud_task_receipt_v1 shape ({schema, category_id, checked_at, checks:[{name,passed,detail}], summary:{total,passed,failed}}) so an INDEPENDENT Cloudflare Worker verifier can re-derive it with zero trust in the author. VERIFIER DOCTRINE (identical to cat-09-receipt-trust-audit-layer): the verifier IGNORES the submitted summary and RECOMPUTES it from checks[] (total=len(checks), passed=count(passed==true), failed=count(passed==false)); on ANY mismatch it sets verifier_status=FAIL. PASS additionally requires edge-execution + secondary-CF-account proof at the verifier; the sandbox author can NEVER self-mint PASS. In sandbox, authority is always 'none' and verifier_status of an author-emitted receipt MUST be UNVERIFIED until the Worker rules. checks[].evidence carries stored proof (http_status, body/dom hash, artifact path) not prose.

schema.description: Fixed discriminator. The verifier rejects any other value.

workflow_contract_id.description: FK -> WorkflowContract.id whose deterministic_checks this receipt reports.

sandbox_job_id.description: FK -> SandboxJob.id that produced these checks.

category_id.description: Factory category that OWNS the promoted receipt-trust (e.g. CAT-09-RECEIPT-TRUST-AUDIT-LAYER for guard/link/receipt checks, CAT-10-VERTICAL-PROOF-PRODUCTS for revenue/vertical-proof checks). Set from the contract's promotion. The independent verifier binds to an EXPECTED_CATEGORY_ID and FAILs on mismatch, exactly as the factory verifiers do.

checked_at.description: Machine-generated at check time; never hand-typed.

checks.description: One entry per deterministic_check declared in the WorkflowContract. Pure/no-LLM outcomes only (HTTP status, DOM/selector presence, regex match, hash equality). The verifier recomputes summary from this array.

name.description: Stable check name; MUST match a deterministic_checks[].name in the contract.

passed.description: Pure boolean outcome. The verifier counts these; it does not re-run the check but re-derives the summary and validates evidence shape.

evidence.description: Stored proof, not prose. Lets the CF Worker (and a human) independently re-derive the boolean.

artifact_path.description: Sandbox-local path to the saved response/DOM/diff artifact.

summary.description: Author-claimed rollup. AUTHORITATIVELY RECOMPUTED by the verifier from checks[]; a mismatch forces verifier_status=FAIL. total MUST equal passed+failed and equal checks.length.

value_class.description: Business value lens for this contract's outcome. REVENUE=directly blocks money paths (CTAs, auth, pricing/offer copy). GUARD=protects trust/compliance (broken links, legal footer, request-id visibility, route health). META=tooling/UX signal (web chat UX, responsive smoke). NONE=informational.

verifier_status.description: PASS is issuable ONLY by the independent Cloudflare Worker after summary re-derivation + edge/secondary-account proof. FAIL=checks failed or summary mismatch or category/schema mismatch. BLOCKED=verifier could not run (network/policy). UNVERIFIED=author-emitted in sandbox, not yet adjudicated (the ONLY legal value for a sandbox self-write).

authority.description: Sandbox receipts always carry authority='none'. No PASS may be self-minted here.

verifier_runtime.description: Set by the Worker on adjudication, e.g. 'cloudflare_worker'. Absent on sandbox self-writes.

verified_receipt_id.description: Set by the Worker; the id of the independently re-derived receipt.

recomputed.description: The verifier's own re-derived summary, written back so the mismatch (if any) is visible.
